ARGUMENT IS HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU) **AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER GRANTING SPECIALLY-APPEARING DEFENDANT FRONTEO, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH. (SEE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING) **
